changed_supply_chain_surfaces.rationale: The policy records local evidence freshness requirements for future workflow evidence gates, but it does not edit installed global skills or authorize external skill installation.
The template records future work-item evidence fields for Evidence Freshness SLOs without changing installed skill contents.

sca_or_equivalent.unavailable_tool_disposition: No dependency manifest, dependency version, package-manager script, lockfile, CI or release workflow, fetched prompt, external tool install, executable generated content, or unknown supply-chain surface change is present in the BANDIT-056 implementation. Evidence Freshness SLOs add local policy and template metadata only.

dependency_manifest_state.rationale: BANDIT-056 adds local Evidence Freshness SLO policy validation, command routing, derived projection trust-signal output, sanitizer hardening, and focused tests without changing dependency manifests or package-manager scripts.

lockfile_state.manifest_rationale: No dependency manifest change is present.

skills.freshness_rule: validated by npm run bandit -- evidence-freshness-slos validate --json before landing and before trusting derived evidence projections
skills.revocation_path: remove or revise .bandit/policy/evidence-freshness-slos.json and matching derived projection trust-signal validation

agent_skills.freshness_rule: validated by npm run bandit -- evidence-freshness-slos validate --json
agent_skills.revocation_path: remove or revise the Evidence Freshness SLO policy and template

rationale: BANDIT-056 touches local Evidence Freshness SLO policy and template surfaces that define future evidence trust-signal metadata, so explicit supply-chain gate evidence is recorded before local-record landing. The implementation does not touch dependency manifests, lockfiles, package-manager scripts, CI or release workflows, installed global skills, fetched prompts, external tool install paths, executable generated content, or unknown supply-chain surfaces. No operator-supervised supply-chain approval is required before local-record landing.
